heading: Postal matters
label: 1339 Postal matters
text: The district courts shall have original jurisdiction of any civil action arising under any Act of Congress relating to the postal service.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 41(6) (, par. 6, ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 2436 Stat. 1092Changes were made in phraseology.
